questions.question: Explain the significance of reducing waste generation and increasing recycling rates (SDG 12.6) in achieving sustainable development. Provide two possible actions to achieve this target.
How does the target of achieving 100% renewable energy (SDG 7.6) contribute to reducing greenhouse gas emissions? Describe two measures that can be taken by individuals to promote this target.

Explain the importance of reducing single-use plastics (SDG 12.4) and promoting the use of biodegradable alternatives. Provide one possible action that can be taken by a community to reduce single-use plastics in their local area.
